name: American Airlines

carryOn.notes: One carry-on and one personal item allowed. Basic Economy allows one personal item only on most domestic routes.

economy.notes: $30 for first bag on most domestic routes.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Spare lithium batteries and power banks must be in carry-on only
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Carry-on only. Up to 100Wh no approval needed. 101–160Wh requires airline approval. No batteries over 160Wh.
batteryRules.powerBankLimit: 100Wh unrestricted, up to 160Wh with airline approval
batteryRules.laptops: Allowed in carry-on. May need to be removed at security checkpoint.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries
Firearms must be declared and packed unloaded in locked hard-sided containers

faqs.question: Can I bring a carry-on bag on American Airlines Basic Economy?
faqs.answer: Basic Economy passengers on most domestic routes are limited to one personal item that fits under the seat. A carry-on bag fee applies if you want to use the overhead bin.

faqs.question: How much does American Airlines charge for checked bags?
faqs.answer: On most domestic routes the first checked bag is $30, the second is $40. International fees vary by route. AAdvantage elite members and co-branded credit card holders may receive free checked bags.

faqs.question: Can I bring a power bank on American Airlines?
faqs.answer: Yes, power banks must be in your carry-on bag. Power banks up to 100Wh are allowed without approval. Banks between 101–160Wh require airline approval. Banks over 160Wh are not permitted.
